name: Dustin Poirier
oneLiner: The best non-undisputed lightweight resume in this range: elite wins everywhere, an interim belt, three undisputed title misses, and a capped loss profile keeping him out of the h…
compareShortCase: Poirier is the modern lightweight quality-wins case: Holloway, Gaethje, Alvarez, Pettis, Conor, Hooker, Chandler, and Saint Denis without an undisputed title win.
compareCounter: The missing undisputed belt is the limiter. Dustin was consistently at the highest level, but several legacy-defining title fights went the other way.
